description: Gamma Phase 6: h2_end_stream=2 + SSE text/event-stream. DB changes: (1) h2_end_stream 1->2 (delayed END_STREAM), (2) h2_hold_request 0->1, (3) envelope JSON->SSE (event:chunk + JSON object).
steps: 3. DevTools F12 -> Network (Preserve log ON) + Console
